Story.Name: SoulColor_gong_1
Story.Desc: [NAME] came to [PLACE] and found that this place was the Taoist inheritance of the "Colorful Colored Glass Sutra". The inheritance was surrounded by a former ancient immortal formation, which seemed to be a seal set by ancient immortals to select suitable inheritors of Taoism.. The electricity and light flow in the formation, it seems that there is a great magical power.

li.OKResult: me:AddMsg(XT("[NAME] runs the primordial spirit, violently cracks the magic circle with tyrannical cultivation base, and obtains the tradition and heritage."));me:AddSchoolScore(1,200);story:FinishSecret();me : DropAwardItem("Item_Dan_TreeEXP", 1);me:UnLockGong("SoulColor_1");
me:AddMsg(XT("[NAME] thought about it, decided not to take the risk anymore, turned around and left."));

Story.Name: SoulColor_CM
Story.Desc: [NAME] Meditates in the Magic Circle aquire the Colorful Mountain location.

Story.Name: SoulColor_DianHuaXianYuan
Story.Desc: [NAME] found a seedling with great talent nearby through the magic circle. If he wanted to use magical powers, he enchanted this mortal. Need to consume 1 million spiritual energy, this mortal will reach the sect as soon as possible after casting.

Story.Name: SoulColor_JiTianShu
Story.Desc: Please select the weather you want to pray for. The use of sacrificial art requires 100,000 Qi.
